title: Help & Guide
subtitle: Learn how to use RetailMind AI to grow your business
guide1Step1: Add your products with their names and prices
guide1Step2: The app will automatically track competitor prices
guide1Step3: Get instant alerts when prices change
guide1Step4: Make smarter pricing decisions based on insights
guide2Step1: Dashboard shows your key metrics at a glance
guide2Step3: Actions tab shows recommended pricing changes
guide2Step4: Alerts notify you of important market changes
guide3Step2: Get instant answers about your products
featureDashboardDesc: Your home screen showing key metrics, recent alerts, and quick actions. See your business health at a glance.
featureProductsDesc: Manage your inventory. Add products, set prices, and link competitor products to track their prices automatically.
featureActionsDesc: Smart recommendations for pricing changes. Each suggestion includes the reason and potential revenue impact.
featureAlertsDesc: Get notified when competitors change prices, stock runs low, or important market events happen.
featureForecastDesc: Predict future demand for your products based on historical trends and market patterns.
featureInsightsDesc: Understand market trends, competitor strategies, and opportunities to grow your business.
featureReportsDesc: Detailed analysis and performance reports to track your progress over time.
faq1A: RetailMind AI is your smart pricing assistant. It watches competitor prices, alerts you to changes, and helps you make better pricing decisions - all automatically.
faq2A: Go to the Products tab and click 'Add Product'. Enter your product name, your price, and optionally add competitor links from Amazon or Flipkart. The app will track prices for you.
faq3A: Dashboard shows your overview. Products manages your inventory. Actions shows pricing recommendations. Alerts notifies you of changes. Forecast predicts demand. Insights shows trends. Reports gives detailed analysis.
faq4A: When a competitor changes their price or your product is running low on stock, you'll get an instant alert. You can view all alerts in the Alerts tab and take action immediately.
faq5A: Based on competitor prices and market trends, the app suggests optimal prices for your products. You'll see these in the Actions tab with clear reasons for each suggestion.
faq6Q: How accurate is the price tracking?
faq6A: The app checks competitor prices regularly and updates you in real-time. You can see price history charts to understand trends over time.
needHelpDesc: If you're having trouble or have questions:
needHelpPoint1: Check the Settings tab to configure alerts and notifications
needHelpPoint2: Make sure your products have competitor links for price tracking
needHelpPoint3: Visit each tab to explore all features
needHelpPoint4: Your data is automatically saved and synced
